rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER MORGAN ET AL VS. SYDA DAY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joint Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings To The Cross-Complaint Of Vesta Asset Management, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 9, 2019 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT SYDNEY DAY, VITHAL, LLC Joint Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings To The Cross-Complaint Of Vesta Asset Management, Inc. is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Cross-Complainant to allege facts in support of causes of action 1to 5 in light of authorities cited by the moving party and procedural posture of this action. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 9, 2019 line DEFENDANT 2619 MISSION I2, LLC, 1025 SUTTER I5, LLC, 735 O'FARRELL 17, LP, 737 PINE I1, LLC, VIC STRATEGIC MULTIFAMILY PARTNERS, LP, 430 BAKER I5 LLC, 430 BAKER I5 LP, 2824-2828 GEARY LLC, 781 O'FARRELL I7, LP MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to August 28, 2019. rulings.Case Title: PAULA HAGAN BENNETT VS. BERNARD JOSEPH HAGAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Order And Writ Of Attachmt
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 9, 2019 line 8. PLAINTIFF PAULA BENNETT Notice Of Application And Hearing For Order And Writ Of Attachmt DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to establish probable validity of its claims for elder abuse with competent admissible evidence. The Court notes that moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of its reply filed on August 7, 2019. Failure to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future will result in briefs/declarations not being considered. = (501/CFH)
